recalls.Description: SumDirect has issued a recall for its LED mini lights due to a significant safety risk. These lights, designed for decoration, feature a rotating design and a hanging loop, and come equipped with three LR41 button cell batteries that are easily accessible. This poses a danger to children, as ingestion of these batteries can lead to severe injuries or even death. The product fails to meet safety standards outlined by Reese's Law, which requires proper warnings for items containing such batteries.
recalls.Title: Recall of SumDirect LED Mini Lights Due to Serious Injury Risk from Accessible Batteries
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, consumers should contact SumDirect via email at recall@dgfuxin.cn or visit www.SumDirect.cn and select the Refund & Exchange option.

Images.Caption: Recalled SumDirect LED Mini Blinking Lights
Each of the 24 multicolored, blinking lights includes three preinstalled LR41 button cell batteries

Retailers.Name: Available for purchase on Amazon.com from January 2016 until November 2025, priced around $23.

Distributors.Name: Dongguan Fuxin E-Commerce Co., Ltd., dba SumDirect, of China

Hazards.Name: Ingestion hazard due to accessible button cell batteries, violating safety standards.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the lights, keep them away from children, and contact SumDirect for a refund.

recalls.metaDescription: SumDirect recalls LED mini lights due to serious ingestion risks from accessible batteries. Learn how to get a refund and ensure safety.
